notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-280 — thanks for testing! New in this batch: CANDLES FIXED (the daily refresh was wiping the open/high/low candles need — stored history is now preserved and regrows daily; refresh once for full depth, with honestly-labelled approximate candles until then, and candles now work in demo too), the portfolio balance warning behaves (rounding dust never warns; real differences show the $ amount and clear with one tap), 🔔 What's changed for me (a personal briefing on YOUR holdings & watchlist each fresh data day), the report card's news-driven vs quiet split, a professional chart refresh, the Liquidity + RSI-zone filters, the 🪜 Pullback in Uptrend report, lessons & help covering it all, and demo shares with their correct real company names. This copy updates separately from the released app. Anything odd, confusing or brilliant — use the ✉ feedback link in the top-left.
